source.title: Star Atlas Weekly News Recap #68
source.author: Intergalactic Herald
source.classification_rationale: Weekly newsletter/recap aggregates developments and linked sources.

summary.neutral_abstract: Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week. We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us. Star Atlas Chatter #3 - The Only Constant in Life… Week in Review 6/24 – 6/30
summary.historical_value: Contemporary Intergalactic Herald publication preserved with role and attribution boundaries.
summary.current_validity_warning: Summaries, roadmaps, operational details, and attributed statements require reconciliation with primary and later sources.

article_text:
Welcome to the Star Atlas weekly recap from the Intergalactic Herald. Below is what happened with Star Atlas this past week.
We are looking for guests to be on our podcast. The podcast is a discussion of the past week’s news about Star Atlas. If you are interested in being on the podcast, please contact us.
The Atlas Star ✧ Issue #19
Star Atlas published their latest newsletter.
Star Atlas Economic Report 2023 Q2
Star Atlas published their latest economic report.
Star Atlas, Building a Digital Economy
Tomorrows World posted a video summary of Star Atlas.
Aephia Data Dashboards
Aephia releases a data dashboard about the Star Atlas Marketplace.
Star Atlas Chatter #3 - The Only Constant in Life… Week in Review 6/24 – 6/30 2023
RahMega posted a video recapping the past week of news in Star Atlas.
Metaverse Nomads #101 Star Atlas w/ Winston | ROME
Metaverse Nomads posted a video of their weekly Star Atlas live stream.
Impromptu Friday Q&A with Michael and the Star Atlas Team
Aephia posted a video replay of a Star Atlas Q&A.
Star Atlas – June Recap (Star Atlas R2.1, R4 Transition, New Ships, and More!)
DominicVain posted a video recapping the Star Atlas announcements for June.
STAR ATLAS #188 CHECK YOUR SHIPS!
MetaVerse Explorer posted a video of Star Atlas news.
Star Atlas July 4th Recap News!!
Beyond The Horizon posted a Star Atlas news recap.
Everything We Know About REC So Far
The Hologram published an article about the upcoming Star Atlas REC.
Star Atlas Claim Stakes VS Star Atlas Mining Ships
Beyond the Horizon posted a video comparing Star Atlas claim stakes to mining ships.
The Atlas Brew #70
Star Atlas TV posted a video replay of the recent Atlas Brew.
Star Atlas and Hello Moon Partner to Level Up Gaming with Live Data Streaming
Star Atlas published an article about their partnership with Hello Moon.
Star Atlas DAO Lays Foundation for Sustainable Governance in Gaming
Star Atlas published an article introducing the first proposal for the Star Atlas DAO.
Star Atlas PIP-1 Part I – Constitution and DAO
The Hologram News Network posted a video summary of the news about the Star Atlas DAO.
Michael Wagner Addresses New Star Atlas Ship Configs
The Hologram News Network posted a video about comments from the Star Atlas CEO on the recent ship reconfigurations.
